title: Undo
story: 第二关开始露出一点性格。她不再给直路，而是逼你用另一种结构抵达同一个结果。

pre_story.speaker: Unknown
pre_story.text: No Sort this time. I wanted a different shape for the same promise.

post_story.speaker: S.
post_story.text: Reverse is the simplest. But sometimes you can't just undo.

discovery_hint: 最小堆每次弹出的是当前最小值。
